title: 1 1 195166 im tab aegean en
text:
Consumer Protection Cooperation (CPC) network action on airlines’ COVID-19 related cancellation practices
Implementation table submitted by Aegean Airlines
Date: 14/4/2022
In the context of the CPC network’s coordinated investigation into airlines’ COVID-19 related cancellation practices, 16 major
airlines operating on the EU market have made wide-ranging commitments to clear their reimbursement backlogs, offer cash
reimbursement for unused vouchers that had been pushed on consumers in the early stages of the pandemic and better
inform consumers about their cancellation-related passenger rights.1
This implementation table outlines the commitments made by Aegean Airlines and the measures taken by Aegean Airlines to
implement its commitments and achieve full implementation.
Commitment Measures taken by the airline State of play of implementation /
currently remaining issues

reimbursement backlog by reimbursement backlog by 30 September
